title: selaginella pumila
intro: Selaginella pumila, also known as Dwarf Spikemoss or Resurrection Fern, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella pumila are attributed to its ability to improve respiratory health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Selaginella pumila can be made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
